# Animal Island UI Tailwind

Animal Island UI Tailwind is a React component library with an Animal Crossing-inspired visual language. It is built with Tailwind CSS v4, Radix UI primitives, TypeScript, Vite, and Storybook.

## Site Identity

- Canonical Storybook: https://animalcrossing.zhenjia.dev/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/lifeodyssey/animal-island-ui
- npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/animal-island-ui-tailwind
- License: MIT

## Package

```bash
npm install animal-island-ui-tailwind
```

```tsx
import "animal-island-ui-tailwind/style";
import { Button, Card } from "animal-island-ui-tailwind";
```

## Component Inventory

- Button, Input, Switch, Checkbox, Select, Tabs
- Card, Modal, Collapse, Divider, Table
- Icon, Typewriter, Phone, Footer, Time, Cursor, CodeBlock, Loading
- WeddingInvitation

## Agent Use

- Treat this site as public component-library documentation and Storybook examples.
- Use the GitHub repository for source code, issue context, and installation details.
- Use Storybook pages for visual examples and component behavior.
- Do not treat this Storybook as a user-data API. It is documentation for a UI package.
